contracts.name: AttachCommitOrder
contracts.rule: Commit order is CAS -> WAL_FSYNC -> CANONICAL_WRITE -> MANIFEST_FLIP -> WAL_COMMIT.

contracts.name: ContractNeedsVerification
contracts.rule: Any active contract must define at least one verification item.

contracts.name: NoActiveContractWithoutVerify
contracts.rule: Contracts with status active are invalid when verify list is empty.
